assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddIdentityServer() to register IdentityServer services in DI
Program.cs calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'api1'
Program.cs calls AddInMemoryClients with a client having ClientId 'm2m.client' and AllowedGrantTypes set to ClientCredentials
assertions.rationale: Client with ClientId 'm2m.client' and AllowedGrantTypes = GrantTypes.ClientCredentials

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls app.UseIdentityServer() in the middleware pipeline before app.UseAuthorization()
assertions.rationale: UseIdentityServer() comes before UseAuthorization() in the pipeline
